activeRoles.label: Conceptualization
activeRoles.def: Ideas; formulation or evolution of overarching research goals and aims.

activeRoles.label: Data Curation
activeRoles.def: Management activities to annotate, scrub and maintain research data for initial use and later re-use.

activeRoles.label: Formal Analysis
activeRoles.def: Application of statistical, mathematical, computational, or other formal techniques to analyse or synthesize study data.

activeRoles.label: Funding Acquisition
activeRoles.def: Acquisition of the financial support for the project leading to this publication.

activeRoles.label: Investigation
activeRoles.def: Conducting a research and investigation process, specifically performing the experiments, or data/evidence collection.

activeRoles.label: Methodology
activeRoles.def: Development or design of methodology; creation of models.

activeRoles.label: Project Administration
activeRoles.def: Management and coordination responsibility for the research activity planning and execution.

activeRoles.label: Resources
activeRoles.def: Provision of study materials, reagents, materials, patients, laboratory samples, animals, instrumentation, computing resources, or other analysis tools.

activeRoles.label: Software
activeRoles.def: Programming, software development; designing computer programs; implementation of the computer code and supporting algorithms; testing of existing code components.

activeRoles.label: Supervision
activeRoles.def: Oversight and leadership responsibility for the research activity planning and execution, including mentorship external to the core team.

activeRoles.label: Validation
activeRoles.def: Verification of the overall replication/reproducibility of results/experiments and other research outputs.

activeRoles.label: Visualization
activeRoles.def: Preparation, creation and/or presentation of the published work, specifically visualization/data presentation.

activeRoles.label: Writing – original draft
activeRoles.def: Preparation, creation and/or presentation of the published work, specifically writing the initial draft (including substantive translation).

activeRoles.label: Writing – review & editing
activeRoles.def: Critical review, commentary or revision of the published work by those from the original research group, including pre- or post-publication stages.
